entries.formula: (score - median_starter_score) / delta_win_pos when score, median_starter_score, and delta_win_pos are available and delta_win_pos > 0; otherwise fall back to stored_pos_week_score.
entries.rounding: Stored raw in memory; rounded to 3 decimals in roster history weekly rows.
entries.season_availability: Canonical where positional baseline metadata exists. Full coverage begins in 2020 for the current rookie-history window.
entries.fallback_behavior: Use stored_pos_week_score when metadata inputs are missing or invalid. Return null when neither computed nor stored score is available.

entries.formula: elite if pos_week_score >= 1.0; plus if pos_week_score >= 0.25; neutral if pos_week_score >= -0.5; otherwise dud.
entries.rounding: No rounding beyond upstream pos_week_score handling.
entries.season_availability: Canonical where positional baseline metadata exists. Full coverage begins in 2020 for the current rookie-history window.
entries.fallback_behavior: Return null when pos_week_score is unavailable.

entries.formula: Across rookie season + next 2 seasons, classified_weeks_3yr is the count of weekly rows with a canonical pos_bucket. elite_weeks counts elite buckets. dud_weeks counts dud buckets. non_dud_weeks = classified_weeks_3yr - dud_weeks. elite_week_rate = elite_weeks / classified_weeks_3yr. dud_week_rate = dud_weeks / classified_weeks_3yr. Stored non_dud_rate is derived from the same rounded dud_week_rate as 1 - dud_week_rate so the published rates remain internally consistent.
entries.rounding: Counts stored as integers. Rates rounded to 2 decimals in acquisition history.
entries.fallback_behavior: Use legacy_week_flags_v1 for pre-2020 rookie classes.

entries.formula: Across rookie season + next 2 seasons, classified_weeks_3yr is total weekly games. elite_weeks sums legacy elite_week flags. non_dud_weeks sums legacy winning_week flags. Rates divide each count by classified_weeks_3yr when the denominator is > 0, else 0.
entries.rounding: Counts stored as integers. Rates rounded to 2 decimals in acquisition history.
entries.fallback_behavior: dud_weeks and dud_week_rate remain null because canonical dud data is unavailable.

entries.formula: Bucket overall rookie picks into 6-pick ranges: 01-06, 07-12, 13-18, and so on.
Median points_rookiecontract for all rows in the same pick_bucket.
entries.rounding: Rounded to 2 decimals in acquisition history.
entries.fallback_behavior: 0.0 when a bucket has no values.

entries.rounding: Rounded to 2 decimals in acquisition history.
entries.fallback_behavior: 0.0 expected_points_3yr when a bucket has no values.

entries.formula: 100 * sum(component_scaled * weight) across: points_rookiecontract_scaled*0.27, elite_week_rate_scaled*0.15, non_dud_rate_scaled*0.12, starts_share_scaled*0.12, positional_value_score_scaled*0.12, overall_impact_score_scaled*0.12, roi_score_scaled*0.10
entries.rounding: Scaled inputs stay raw floats; final score rounded to 2 decimals.
entries.fallback_behavior: Each raw component is min-max scaled by offense_defense cohort before weighting. When a cohort has no spread, non-zero values scale to 0.5 and zero values to 0.0.
